public_reputation: Comptroller of docking fees, customs receipts, and bonded cargo around Cosmoria's harbor-palace systems.
manner: Carries the habits of a harbor comptroller whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Cosmoria.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of harbor comptroller in and around Cosmoria, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Cosmoria workable through the obligations of harbor comptroller while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of harbor comptroller credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Cosmoria.

adventure_hooks.summary: Harbor Comptroller Senrik Vale can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Cosmoria.
Harbor Comptroller Senrik Vale becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a harbor comptroller.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Harbor Comptroller Senrik Vale is readable as a harbor comptroller tied to Cosmoria.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Cosmoria: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Harbor Comptroller Senrik Vale presents as someone shaped by the duties of a harbor comptroller and the daily pressures of Cosmoria.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a harbor comptroller, and proof that strangers will not make Cosmoria harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Harbor Comptroller Senrik Vale refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a harbor comptroller too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Harbor Comptroller Senrik Vale can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Harbor Comptroller Senrik Vale adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Harbor Comptroller Senrik Vale always knows more about Cosmoria than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to harbor comptroller duties in Cosmoria.
